calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2002 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up On Calendar In Scd 218 At 9:00 A.M. On August 27, 2002.
Off Calendar Aug-27-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for default prove-up hearing. Judge: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Eric L. Throne. Plaintiff represented by Duncan Lemmon, Esq. presents evidence. The following documents are marked for identification and moved into evidence. A) Exhibit A - #400170 - Fee Agreement for Information; B) Balance Sheet 5-3101 - Systems & Network Corp.; C) Defendant's Payments thru June 07,2001; D) Letter: Right to Arbitration. Court takes evidence and good cause appearing, the court signed the order approving compromise of claim. (see imaged document).
